name: Susmita Behera
body: Susmita is a Technical Project Manager at BeeHyv, where she has managed large-scale programmes including national health campaigns across Nigeria reaching millions of beneficiaries. She holds PMP, PRINCE2, Lean Six Sigma, and SAFe certifications, with earlier stints at Finastra. She manages delivery for the engineering teams behind PUCAR's DRISTI platform.
